title: Amarite Tuning Forks
description: A high quality resource pack that turns your amarite longsword into a big tuning fork! works with AxA.
body:
# If you like the textures of this mod, i recomend checking out https://modrinth.com/mod/attuned, the textures here were also used as a skin for that mod

# About
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

A simple texture pack that makes the Amarite long sword from Amarite into a cool tuning fork!

## Arsenal Compatabilty
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If you want to use the Arsenal compat, please visit _Hellay's Amarite X Arsenal Compat Data Pack.
